briefdescription.para: Get slope for Leaky ReLU (negative region)
Get axis for operations like softmax.
Get the second input tensor (for binary ops)
Get the third input tensor (for ternary ops)

parameterdescription.para: The operation to perform (see PointwiseMode enum)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

detaileddescription.para:
PointwiseAttributes specifies the parameters for pointwise operations that operate element-wise on tensors. This includes:
Activation functions: RELU, SIGMOID, TANH, GELU, ELU, SWISH, etc.
Arithmetic operations: ADD, MUL, SUB, DIV, etc.
Comparison operations: CMP_EQ, CMP_GT, etc.
Other supported pointwise operations as defined in PointwiseMode
